description: A step-by-step guide for new users to understand the app's features and how to get started with cooking lessons.

steps.instruction: Welcome the user and explain the app's purpose: to help them learn cooking skills in a fun and interactive way.
Guide the user through setting up their profile and preferences.
Introduce the interactive lesson engine and how to navigate through lessons.
Explain the progress tracking features and how to earn rewards for completing lessons.
Encourage users to start with the first lesson and provide a link to it.
